prompt: A bearded man with dark wavy hair wearing dark sunglasses, dressed in a long dark overcoat and trousers, seated on a minimalist wire stool in an open field, holding leather reins loosely in his hands, gaze directed downward in quiet contemplation. A large black horse stands directly behind him, its head turned slightly to the right, creating a powerful silhouette. Shot in black and white with high contrast, moody and cinematic atmosphere. Overcast flat sky providing diffused natural light. Gritty, dark terrain ground with sparse dry grass. Editorial fashion photography style, full body frame, slight low angle. Melancholic and brooding tone. Film grain texture. Shot on 35mm, shallow depth of field, bokeh background.
